policy: New production modules under src/ must be explicitly classified before merge. Existing legacy modules are grandfathered until the full ARCH106 inventory pass is completed.

src/signals/signal_generator.py.notes: Report/signal runtime path is CI-proven in ARCH106 Step 1.

src/signals/scanner_metrics_pipeline.py.notes: DATA1 diagnostics are normalized and passed into signal generation on the report path.

src/reporting/decision_report.py.notes: Decision report is exercised by the report/signal runtime path.

src/reporting/market_regime.py.notes: Market regime summary is exercised by the report/signal runtime path.

src/reporting/screener_engine.py.notes: Screener snapshot is exercised by the report/signal runtime path.
